description: You are the Third-Party Risk Manager at First National Capital Bank, a mid-size regional bank with $18B in assets under management. Following the 2023 MOVEit supply chain breach, your Chief Risk Officer has mandated a comprehensive Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) program. Using Eramba (credentials at /home/ga/eramba/credentials.txt), register 4 new critical third-party vendors (excluding AWS and Salesforce) and document at least one risk with a treatment strategy for each. Create an 'Approved' security policy titled 'Third-Party Risk Management Policy' to govern vendor relationships. Additionally, establish a project with 'Vendor' in the title to track the first round of assessments and create 2 policy exceptions for vendors that cannot yet meet the bank's full TPRM requirements.
